problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: If Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI is applied to alone, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
